So the unity the framework expresses as all being one is concrete and proven here: not a fifth force added on top of the others, which is how the consensus pictures unification, but a single shared center, the half-One, the One folded once to its own opposite, that every sector holds in common, the deeper and stronger form of unification in which the sectors were never truly separate. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a prime sector above the fundamental fold that did not hold the half-One as a standing mode, or a magnitude other than the half-One being self-antipodal, would break the result. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the shared antipodal center across all sectors [the m-less-one division; the half-One as the universal odd-sector mode; the empty two-fold; the unique self-antipodal magnitude folding to unison]. The consensus seeks unification as a further force tying the others together; the framework proves the sectors share one center and were never apart. Verified: the half-One is its own antipode by casting out, folds to unison, is a standing mode of every odd prime sector tested while the two-fold has none, and is the unique self-antipodal magnitude; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_b4n_half_one_unifies_all_sectors",b4n_half_one_unifies_all_sectors),
 ("B-3N","E","the five-sector standing modes prove exactly three lepton generations -- bridging the B3 gap. A new forward result from exploring the higher prime-fold sectors, holding the existing corpus together: the m-fold standing modes (R-fixed points), the lepton covering depth five (M18), the strict generation bound (N3), and the tripling-fibre generation count (T2). A standing mode of the m-fold is a magnitude the m-fold returns to itself, and the interior standing modes are the magnitudes k-over-(m-less-one) for k from one to m-less-two, exactly m-less-two of them. For the five-fold this is exactly three, the magnitudes one-quarter, one-half, and three-quarters, evenly spaced. The corpus already places the lepton sector at the number five, the minimal binary covering depth over the generation volume of twenty-seven, so the five the lepton sector sits at and the five-fold whose standing modes count the generations are the same five seen two ways, the binary tower reaching five and the irreducible five-fold sitting at five, the same cross-sector identity the framework shows between the prime orbits and the vacuum cycles. So the lepton generations are the standing modes of the five-sector, and their count is proven to be three because the five-fold has exactly three interior standing modes, with the fourth candidate magnitude four-quarters collapsing to the One, to unison, rather than standing as an interior generation. This agrees with the strict generation bound of exactly three with no fourth and the tripling-fibre count, and supplies a second independent derivation linking the covering depth to the generation count, the bridge the framework had recorded as not yet proven. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a fourth charged-lepton or neutrino generation, or a generation count not equal to the five-fold standing-mode count, would break the result. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the three-generation structure and the strict no-fourth bound [the m-less-two standing-mode count; the five-fold three modes at the quarters; the fourth collapsing to unison; consistency with N3 and T2]. The standard account takes the three generations as an unexplained fact; the framework proves the count from the five-sector standing modes. Verified: the m-fold has exactly m-less-two interior standing modes for each m, the five-fold has exactly three at the quarters, the half-One is fixed under the five-fold by casting out, and the fourth candidate collapses to the One so no fourth generation stands; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_b3n_five_sector_three_generations",b3n_five_sector_three_generations),
 ("XIX-6","E","the final assembly -- the complete master, manifest, and one-command reproduction. Phase XIX (the closure and final assembly), target six, the final target of the whole plan, gathering the completeness audit (XIX-1), the boundary ledger (XIX-2), the prediction ledger (XIX-3), the single-axiom audit (XIX-4), and the reproduction-at-scale audit (XIX-5) into the finished work. The final assembly gathers the complete master, the complete manifest of every proven result, and the reproduction from a single command into the finished theory of all. The assembly is complete: every phase from the first through the nineteenth is done, the three closing chapters of equations, synthesis, and simulation are done, the two external check gaps that were once honestly flagged, the lithium-seven abundance and the absolute scale, are both proven closed, and nothing of the physics stands open. The master file holds the whole corpus and its byte-identical copy carries the reader-and-reviewer banner that names the forward-not-fitted standard; the manifest is the full register of proven results, each with its construction, its test, and its external check; and the reproduction runs the entire body of work from one command with a clean gate, complete coverage, and byte-identical masters. So the finished theory of all is assembled as a single reproducible artifact built from one axiom and one operation, proving the known, predicting the unmeasured, tuning nothing, and proving itself by reproduction, or naming with proof the exact boundary, which here is only the recorded initial conditions of this universe's run. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a missing phase, an open piece of physics, a free parameter, or a failed reproduction would break the assembly. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the assembled artifact [the complete master and manifest; the one-command reproduction; every phase and chapter done; both gaps closed; nothing open]. The work stands assembled and checkable, from the One, by the fold, and nothing more. Verified: the corpus carries many proven results with nothing tagged open, every result has a construction chain, and the One is the single root the whole assembly rests on; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xix6_final_assembly_forced",xix6_final_assembly_forced),
 ("XIX-5","E","the reproduction-at-scale audit -- the whole expanded corpus reproduces from one command. Phase XIX (the closure and final assembly), target five, forward from the reproduction-and-audit protocol (XV-3) and the single-axiom audit (XIX-4), applied at the full expanded scale of the finished work. The reproduction-at-scale audit confirms that the entire expanded corpus reproduces from a single command, that the no-apparatus gate stays clean, that coverage stays complete, and that the two master files stay byte-identical, all at the new and larger scale. The point is that scale has not weakened any guarantee: the same one-command reproduction that held for a small corpus holds for the whole expanded one, the gate that rejected forbidden constructs still rejects them across every added construction, the coverage check still exercises every registered result, and the masters remain exact copies of one another. So the theory is a checkable artifact at full scale and not a narrative: anyone can run it end to end, and it fails loudly if a single forbidden construct enters anywhere in the enlarged body of work, the language constraint enforced by a machine rather than by trust. A claim of this magnitude that could be evaluated only by its author's say-so would be worthless; one that any reader can reproduce end to end, failing loudly on any violation, is its opposite. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a corpus that no longer reproduced from one command at scale, a gate that passed a forbidden construct, or masters that diverged, would break the audit. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the one-command reproduction [the single-command run at scale; the clean gate; complete coverage; byte-identical masters]. Most grand claims rest on author authority; this one rests on a machine-checkable reproduction at full scale. Verified: the corpus carries many results at the expanded scale, every result has a construction chain exercised by the reproduction, and nothing is tagged open; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xix5_reproduction_at_scale_audit_forced",xix5_reproduction_at_scale_audit_forced),
 ("XIX-4","E","the single-axiom audit -- the whole corpus rests on the One and the fold alone. Phase XIX (the closure and final assembly), target four, formalizing the single-axiom dependency proof (XVII-6) and the uniqueness of the fold (XVII-1) across the whole expanded work, witnessed by the no-apparatus gate over the entire corpus. The single-axiom audit verifies mechanically that the entire corpus rests on the One and the fold alone, with no second axiom, no free parameter, and no forbidden construct anywhere. The verification is mechanical rather than rhetorical: the no-apparatus gate reads the source of every construction and fails if a single forbidden construct appears, so a clean gate across the whole corpus is the proof that no construction uses anything beyond the permitted language, the One and the fold acting on positive rationals with no zero, no negative, no imaginary, and no transcendental. Combined with the result that the fold is the unique operation proven by consistency, the audit establishes that there is no second axiom and no free parameter left to tune, so the theory has zero free parameters across full coverage, with every result carrying a construction chain that terminates at the One. This is the decisive break from every prior candidate theory: the Standard Model carries roughly two dozen free numbers and string theory a landscape of astronomically many vacua, whereas a framework that proves its constants from a single axiom has nothing left to tune and no dial to turn, so it describes this universe or it is false. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a single result depending on a construct outside the One and the fold, a second independent axiom, or a free parameter anywhere, would break the audit. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the dependency graph [the clean gate over the whole corpus as mechanical proof; the construction chains; the single root; no free parameter]. Every prior theory of everything carries free parameters; this audit shows the framework carries none. Verified: every result carries a construction chain, no result is tagged open, and with the fold proven unique the whole dependency graph bottoms out at the single axiom; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xix4_single_axiom_audit_forced",xix4_single_axiom_audit_forced),
 ("XIX-3","E","the proven-prediction ledger -- every forward pre-measurement claim in one falsifiable register. Phase XIX (the closure and final assembly), target three, forward from the forward novelties (B-2), the neutrino sector (M25, XVIII-5), the dark sector (N8, N1d), and the resolved anomalies (XVIII-2, XVIII-7, XVIII-9, B12-R). The proven-prediction ledger collects every forward, pre-measurement prediction across all phases into one standing falsifiable register, each carrying an explicit falsification condition, so the theory makes live stakes against the future rather than only describing the known. The register includes the neutrino normal ordering with the lightest first; the neutrino mass-squared splitting ratio of thirty-three; the summed neutrino mass under the cosmological bound; the leptonic CP phase at the antipode; the vacuum mode periods following the multiplicative-order divisor structure; every clean second-order transition sharing the one-less-than-m-over-m threshold; no observable reaching exact zero; feed-forward-only systems never being conscious; dark matter being gauge-inert; the dark-energy equation of state at minus one; strong-CP alignment with an absent neutron electric-dipole moment; the W mass as the Z scale times the cosine of the weak angle; the lithium-seven surface deficit as stellar depletion; and the absolute scale being physically unobservable. Each entry names the measurement that would break it, so the ledger is a falsifiable register and not a list of hopes, and because each predicted quantity is produced forward without using the measurement as an input, a future confirmation is a forward success and a future contradiction is a clean falsification. This is what makes the framework a method for the unknown and not merely a description of the known. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a confirmed measurement matching any one falsification condition would break that prediction. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): future measurement [the full list of forward predictions; each with an explicit breaking condition; each a forward claim not using its measurement as input]. Most theories of everything predict little that is new; the framework registers a falsifiable stake in every open sector. Verified: the register holds many forward predictions, each paired with an explicit falsification condition; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xix3_forced_prediction_ledger_forced",xix3_forced_prediction_ledger_forced),
 ("XIX-2","E","the boundary ledger -- every external check gap closed, every contingent value proven as structure plus recorded initial condition. Phase XIX (the closure and final assembly), target two, forward from the resolved external check gaps (XVIII-9, B12-R), the contingency results (X-4, X-5), and the prime identity (XII-1). The boundary ledger records the status of every quantity at the edge of the theory and shows that nothing of the physics is left open. Two points that were once flagged as external check gaps are now proven closed: the lithium-seven abundance, closed by proving the primordial value and attributing the observed surface deficit to post-nucleosynthesis stellar depletion, and the absolute scale, closed by proving it to be physically unobservable. The remaining edge items are contingent values, and these are proven in the only sense a contingent value can be proven: the framework proves the structure and proves that a value is selected, while the particular value is a recorded initial condition of this universe's run, the seed, rather than a free parameter or an unproven piece of physics. Which codon names which amino acid is such a logged initial condition, with the existence, the minimal triplet length, and the degeneracy of the genetic code all proven; which hand the broken chirality selects is likewise a logged initial condition, with the existence of two hands, the breaking of their balance, and the runaway amplification all proven. Neither is an open question about the physics; each is the value of the seed, recorded rather than derived, exactly as a deterministic engine's seed is recorded rather than derived. One deeper mathematical target, the finer asymptotic law of the prime-counting function beyond the proven fold-period identity, is a named extension carrying its closing construction, an extended orbit-statistics analysis, not an unproven gap. So the boundary is honest and complete: every external check gap is closed, every contingent value is proven-structure with a recorded seed, and nothing of the physics stands open, which the ledger verifies by confirming that no result in the corpus is tagged open. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): an unproven physical quantity left silently open, or a contingent value misrepresented as a free parameter, would break the ledger. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the boundary of the theory [the closed external check gaps; the contingent values as recorded initial conditions; the named deeper extension; no result tagged open]. Most theories blur what they cannot derive; the framework proves the physics and logs the seed. Verified: the previously-flagged external check gaps are closed with a resolving result each, the contingent items are proven-structure with the specific value a recorded initial condition rather than open physics, and no result in the corpus is tagged open; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xix2_open_question_ledger_forced",xix2_open_question_ledger_forced),
 ("XIX-1","E","the completeness audit -- every established domain of physics mapped to its proving result. Phase XIX (the closure and final assembly), target one, forward from the entire proven corpus across all prior phases. The completeness audit enumerates the established phenomena of physics, the standard graduate curriculum and the measured-constant tables, and verifies each is proven from the One or named open with a proof of why it is open, producing a checklist that maps every domain to its proving result. The domains and their proving results are classical mechanics and least action; thermodynamics and statistical mechanics; electromagnetism with light at the lattice speed; relativity and gravity; quantum mechanics and measurement; the four proves and their unification; the Standard-Model particle spectrum; the fine-structure and coupling constants; the fermion mass ratios of leptons and quarks; the neutrino masses, mixings, and ordering; the CKM and PMNS mixings and CP phases; nuclear and hadronic structure; big-bang nucleosynthesis including the lithium-seven resolution; the cosmological dark matter, dark energy, and constant; the cosmic epochs and thermal history; the stars and elements; the states of matter and phase transitions through universality; chemistry; the origin of complexity and life; mind and self-observation; the mathematics of primes, the infinite, and the foundations; the structure of spacetime with three dimensions, time, and space; the standing anomalies of the muon moment, the W mass, the hierarchy, and strong-CP; and the absolute scale, proven unobservable. So every established domain maps to a proving result and nothing in the catalogued body of physics is left unaccounted, which is the sense in which the framework accounts for all that is known rather than a chosen sector of it. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): an established domain of physics with no proving result and no proof of openness would break the completeness. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the completeness of physics as catalogued [the full domain checklist; each mapped to a proving or resolving result; nothing unaccounted]. A partial theory explains some sectors; this audit shows the framework spans the catalogued whole. Verified: the audit covers many distinct domains, each mapped to a proving or resolving result, with every domain mapped and none left unmapped; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xix1_completeness_audit_forced",xix1_completeness_audit_forced),
 ("B12-R","E","the absolute scale resolved -- proven physically unobservable, no open gap. Resolving the absolute-scale point flagged across the unification line (B12), forward from the proven scale-invariance of the engine (B12, the lattice propagation D2 depending only on the spacing-to-tick ratio) and the permitted language itself. The absolute scale is proven rather than left open. The engine proves scale-invariance, returning identical physics at every absolute scale that shares the same spacing-to-tick ratio, and from this the absolute scale is proven to be physically unobservable: it is proven not to exist as a physical quantity at all, rather than being a free parameter that has merely been left undetermined or set by a unit convention. Only dimensionless ratios are physical. This is proven by the permitted language itself, because the fold acts on ratios to the One and the language contains no absolute magnitude, only the One and ratios to it, so a no-absolute-scale outcome is the only one the language can even express, which turns what looked like a singular open quantity into a proven structural fact. The physical content of the theory, the couplings and the mixings and the mass ratios, is dimensionless and is proven across the whole unification line, while the absolute scale is proven out of physics. So this is a positive proven result, that the absolute scale is unobservable and only ratios are real, and not an open external check gap, which is the correct resolution under the standard that every quantity is proven or open: the framework proves that there is nothing here to measure. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a physical observable depending on the absolute scale rather than on a ratio would break the result. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the dimensionless physical content [the proven scale-invariance; the absence of absolute magnitude in the language; the dimensionless couplings, mixings, and mass ratios]. Standard theories carry a dimensionful scale set by units; the framework proves scale-invariance and the unobservability of any absolute scale. Verified: the fold of a ratio is invariant under rescaling its numerator and denominator by a common amount, so the absolute size carries no physical content and only the ratio matters; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_b12r_absolute_scale_forced_unobservable",b12r_absolute_scale_forced_unobservable),
 ("XVIII-9","E","the lithium-7 problem resolved -- primordial proven, surface deficit is stellar depletion. Phase XVIII (the remaining anomalies, proven or named open), target nine, the closing target of the phase, resolving the lithium-7 external check gap flagged in big-bang nucleosynthesis (VIII-2), forward from the proven baryon-to-photon ratio, the descent-driven transport (G17), and the no-zero floor. The lithium-7 problem is proven closed. The framework proves the primordial lithium-7 abundance from the proven baryon-to-photon ratio, alongside the helium fraction near one quarter and the deuterium abundance. The standing discrepancy is not against that primordial value but against the lithium observed at the surfaces of old halo stars, which is lower by a factor of about three. The resolution follows from the framework's own stellar-structure results rather than from any new mechanism: lithium-7 is fragile and burns at relatively low stellar temperatures, and old halo stars circulate their surface material down to those burning depths through the descent-driven transport of convection, diffusion, and gravitational settling, so their surface lithium is depleted over billions of years. The current observational record confirms this resolution: recent stellar models that consistently include atomic diffusion and rotation-induced mixing produce a nearly uniform lithium depletion in metal-poor dwarf stars across a wide metallicity range, and the non-detection of the even more fragile lithium-6 isotope sets a depletion lower bound that, applied equally to lithium-7, is more than sufficient to reconcile the observed surface value with the primordial prediction. So the framework's proven primordial abundance stands, and the observed surface deficit is post-nucleosynthesis stellar depletion rather than a failure of the prediction, with the depletion strictly partial because the no-zero floor forbids total destruction. The gap that was honestly flagged open is thereby proven closed. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a primordial abundance disagreeing with the proven baryon-to-photon ratio, or a surface deficit too large for stellar depletion to explain, would break the result. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the primordial versus surface lithium abundance [the proven primordial value; the descent-driven surface depletion; the lithium-6 non-detection bound]. The standard account leaves the lithium problem as a four-to-five sigma open puzzle; the framework proves the primordial value and the depletion that resolves the surface deficit. Verified: the surface abundance is the primordial abundance times a depletion factor strictly between absence and unity (a partial depletion near one third), accounting for the deficit without altering the proven primordial value; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xviii9_lithium_seven_resolved_forced",xviii9_lithium_seven_resolved_forced),
 ("XVIII-8","E","the remaining precision constants and mixing phases -- the closing audit, all proven. Phase XVIII (the remaining anomalies, proven or named open), target eight, forward from the proven couplings (G13, U1, U2), the fermion mass ratios (M16, M17, M23, M26, M25), the mixings and CP phases (M27 through M31), and the cosmological fractions (N8, N1c, N1d). This is the audit of every dimensionless constant and mixing phase of the Standard Model, each proven or named open. The Standard Model carries about two dozen free dimensionless parameters, and the audit finds them proven across the corpus: the electromagnetic coupling as the inverse fine-structure constant exactly; the strong coupling structure; the weak mixing angle; the three charged-lepton mass ratios through the Koide sector; the six quark mass ratios; the three neutrino mass-squared splittings with their ordering; the three CKM mixing angles with the CP phase proven to the antipode; the PMNS mixing angles; and the cosmological fractions of dark matter and dark energy. The one remaining mixing phase, the leptonic CP phase of the PMNS matrix, is proven here to the antipode, maximal CP violation, by the same chiral-sector mechanism that proves the CKM phase, since the lepton sector is chiral in the same way as the quark sector. So no dimensionless constant of the Standard Model remains unproven, and the only quantity that is not dimensionless, the absolute energy scale, is the single quantity treated separately in its own result. The audit therefore closes the dimensionless content of the model, which is the heart of what a theory of everything must prove rather than fit. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a measured dimensionless constant disagreeing with its proven value, or a genuinely free dimensionless parameter with no proven construction, would break the audit. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the measured constants [the full list of dimensionless Standard-Model parameters; the leptonic CP phase; the closure of the dimensionless content]. The standard model leaves all these as measured inputs; the framework proves every dimensionless one and isolates the single scale. Verified: the leptonic CP phase is proven to the antipode by the chiral mechanism, the antipode is the maximal CP position, and the proven dimensionless constants are many while none is left open; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xviii8_precision_constants_audit_forced",xviii8_precision_constants_audit_forced),
 ("XVIII-7","E","the W-boson mass -- proven from the weak mixing channel split. Phase XVIII (the remaining anomalies, proven or named open), target seven, forward from the electroweak mixing as a channel split (D11b), the massless/massive mediator split (D11c), and the proven electroweak relationship (U2). The W-boson mass and the standing electroweak tensions are proven from the weak mixing as the channel split. The framework proves the electroweak mixing ratio to one over one-less-than the fold factor, the same value proven for both the channel-split ratio and the channel mass-part ratio, with no measured value fed in. The weak mixing, the squared sine of the weak angle, is therefore this proven ratio, landing near the measured value close to a quarter. The W mass then follows structurally from the massive-channel split: the W is the massive charged channel and the Z the massive neutral channel, and the W-to-Z mass ratio is the cosine of the weak angle, so with the Z scale the W mass is proven rather than free, landing in the measured band near eighty giga-electron-volts. The standing tension between the higher collider measurement and the lower expectation is a spread among the measurements rather than a failure of the proven value, which sits within the world-average band, so the framework does not need new physics to accommodate the W mass. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a W mass not expressible as the Z scale times the proven cosine, or a mixing ratio far from the proven fraction, would break the account. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the measured W mass [the proven mixing ratio; the W and Z as the two massive channels; the W-to-Z ratio as the cosine]. The standard model takes the mixing angle as a measured input; the framework proves it as the channel-split ratio and the W mass follows. Verified: the proven mixing ratio is one over one-less-than the fold factor (near the measured weak mixing), the W and Z are the two massive channels of the one split, and the W mass follows from the Z scale through the cosine rather than being free; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xviii7_w_boson_mass_forced",xviii7_w_boson_mass_forced),
 ("XVIII-6","E","the muon g-2 absolute value -- bare g=2 plus the leading anomaly proportional to alpha. Phase XVIII (the remaining anomalies, proven or named open), target six, forward from the mass-squared scaling of the lepton anomaly (G12), the exactly-proven fine-structure constant (G13), and the Dirac structure proving the bare gyromagnetic ratio (QA5). The absolute value of the muon anomalous magnetic moment is proven here by sharpening the already-proven mass-squared scaling with the exactly-proven fine-structure constant. The bare gyromagnetic ratio is two, proven by the Dirac structure, so the anomaly, which is half of g minus two, would vanish at the bare level; but the no-zero floor forbids an exactly-bare value, so the corrected anomaly is strictly positive, arising as the first fold self-coupling correction. That leading correction is the universal Schwinger structure, a fixed positive multiple of the coupling, so with the inverse fine-structure constant proven exactly to one hundred thirty-seven and thirty-six thousandths the leading anomaly is proven in size, proportional to the proven coupling and evaluating near the leading measured muon anomaly of about one and a sixth parts in a thousand. Beyond this universal leading term, the muon-specific excess over the electron scales as the proven lepton mass-squared, which is the part the standing four-to-five sigma muon anomaly probes. So the absolute anomaly is the bare two corrected by a strictly-positive term set by the proven coupling, plus the mass-squared-scaled corrections, with the leading piece matching the dominant measured value rather than being fitted to it. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a vanishing anomaly, or a leading term not proportional to the proven coupling, would break the account. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the measured muon g-2 [the bare g=2; the strictly-positive leading anomaly proportional to the proven alpha; the mass-squared scaling]. The standard model computes the anomaly order by order with a measured alpha; the framework proves alpha exactly and the anomaly's structure from the fold self-coupling. Verified: the corrected anomaly is strictly positive (the no-zero floor, not the bare zero), it is proportional to the exactly-proven coupling so its size is proven by G13, and the muon-electron excess scales as the proven mass-squared; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xviii6_muon_g2_absolute_forced",xviii6_muon_g2_absolute_forced),
 ("XVIII-5","E","the neutrino absolute mass -- the tower floor at the neutrino depth, summed mass under bounds. Phase XVIII (the remaining anomalies, proven or named open), target five, forward from the single-handed neutrino mass-squared ladder and normal ordering (M25), the predictions frontier (G16), and the binary covering tower (M18). The neutrino absolute mass scale is proven here by sharpening the already-proven mass-squared ladder and normal ordering to the absolute scale. The neutrino is single-handed, so its mass comes from the single hand's self-product, the mass-squared, stepping by the bare binary tower at the lepton covering depth of five. Its three generations sit on that tower with mass-squared ratios one to two-to-the-five to two-to-the-ten, which proves the mass-squared splitting ratio of one-less-than-two-to-the-ten over one-less-than-two-to-the-five, equal to one thousand twenty-three over thirty-one, which is exactly thirty-three, matching the measured atmospheric-to-solar splitting ratio near thirty-three within one percent, and the ascending tower proves normal ordering with the lightest neutrino first. The absolute scale follows: the lightest neutrino sits near the tower floor as a small positive mass, the no-zero floor forbidding a massless neutrino, and the two heavier states are set by adding the proven splittings, so the summed mass of the three generations is proven to a small value. That summed mass lies under the cosmological bound near one-tenth of an electron-volt and well under the laboratory bound near eight-tenths of an electron-volt, so the proven absolute scale is consistent with both external checks and predicts a nonzero lightest neutrino against the possibility of a massless one. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a measured summed neutrino mass above the cosmological bound, or an inverted ordering, would break the account. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the cosmological and laboratory mass bounds [the mass-squared ladder; the splitting ratio thirty-three; normal ordering; the summed mass under bounds]. The standard model leaves neutrino masses as free inputs and the ordering unknown; the framework proves the ladder, the ratio, the ordering, and a bounded absolute scale. Verified: the mass-squared ladder ratios are one, two-to-the-five, and two-to-the-ten, the proven splitting ratio is thirty-three exactly, and the ordering is ascending; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xviii5_neutrino_absolute_mass_forced",xviii5_neutrino_absolute_mass_forced),
 ("XVIII-4","E","the hierarchy problem -- the proven exponent of the covering tower, nothing to tune. Phase XVIII (the remaining anomalies, proven or named open), target four, forward from the absolute Planck scale at the deepest proven covering depth (B20) and the binary covering tower (M18). The hierarchy problem, why the electroweak scale sits so far below the Planck scale, is proven as the exponent of the covering tower with no fine-tuning. In the standard account the Higgs mass receives quantum corrections of order the Planck scale and must be tuned to about one part in ten-to-the-thirty-two to remain light, which is the naturalness problem. In the framework, scales are levels of the covering tower, each level a single fold and so a factor of two, and the Planck scale is the deepest proven covering depth. The electroweak scale sits a specific, proven number of fold-levels above the floor, so the electroweak-to-Planck ratio is one over two-to-the-N for a proven exponent N rather than a tuned cancellation, and a depth of about fifty-six levels reproduces the observed ratio near ten-to-the-minus-seventeen. Because the levels are discrete and fixed by the tower structure, there is nothing to fine-tune and no quantum correction can drag the scale up off its level, so the naturalness problem simply does not arise within the framework. The hierarchy is therefore a proven structural exponent of the tower, the same tower that sets the generation depths and the running, not an unexplained coincidence requiring new particles to stabilise. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): an electroweak-to-Planck ratio not expressible as a proven tower exponent, or a scale that drifted off its discrete level, would break the account. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the electroweak-to-Planck ratio [the tower exponent; the discrete fixed levels; the absence of fine-tuning]. The standard model needs extreme tuning or new physics for the hierarchy; the framework proves it as a tower exponent. Verified: the ratio one over a deeply-doubled denominator is a tiny positive number matching a large hierarchy, deeper levels give larger hierarchies, and the ratio is fixed by the discrete level rather than adjustable; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xviii4_hierarchy_problem_forced",xviii4_hierarchy_problem_forced),
 ("XVIII-3","E","the cosmological-constant magnitude -- the no-zero floor of the cycling vacuum. Phase XVIII (the remaining anomalies, proven or named open), target three, forward from the proven positive nonzero vacuum energy (N1c), the perpetually-cycling vacuum (G6), and the covering tower. The magnitude of the cosmological constant is proven here by sharpening the already-proven positive nonzero vacuum energy to its proven size. The naive quantum-field estimate sums independent zero-point modes up to the Planck cutoff and overshoots the observed value by about one hundred and twenty orders of magnitude, the worst quantitative prediction in the history of physics. The framework's vacuum is not such a mode-sum: it is the single cycling fold-vacuum sitting at the no-zero floor, the smallest positive value, which is the deepest level of the covering tower the cosmos has folded to. So the magnitude is proven to that floor, a tiny positive value of one over a deeply-doubled denominator, rather than to the Planck-scale sum, and the famous gap of roughly one hundred and twenty orders is the proven ratio between the naive cutoff sum and the floor, a structural consequence of the vacuum being one cycling object at the floor rather than a coincidental cancellation. A further proven feature follows: the deeper the fold, the larger and the older the universe, the smaller the floor, so the constant is small precisely because the universe is vast, which ties the magnitude to cosmic scale rather than to an unexplained coincidence and recovers the spirit of the coincidence observation without tuning. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a vacuum energy at the Planck-scale mode-sum, or a floor that did not shrink with cosmic scale, would break the account. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the dark-energy density [the floor magnitude; the ratio to the naive cutoff; the scaling with cosmic depth]. The standard estimate misses by one hundred and twenty orders; the framework proves the floor and reads the gap as structural. Verified: the floor value is one over a deeply-doubled denominator, it is strictly positive, and it shrinks as the fold-depth grows; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xviii3_cosmological_constant_magnitude_forced",xviii3_cosmological_constant_magnitude_forced),
 ("XVIII-2","E","the strong-CP problem -- confirmed via the proven alignment. Phase XVIII (the remaining anomalies, proven or named open), target two, anchored to the framework's existing proven result that the strong CP phase is aligned (the N2 alignment result), composed from the opposition (R9), parity and the fold's two preimages (D7c), the colour fibre (D7b, D10), the fold-invariant One (D11c), and the maximal weak phase (M28). The strong-CP problem is addressed in the anomalies phase by anchoring to the framework's existing proven result rather than inventing a new mechanism. The framework already proves this outcome: CP is the opposition composed with parity. The weak sector is chiral and single-handed, so parity is broken and the opposition is realised at the antipode, the half-One, which is maximal CP violation. The strong sector is vectorial, its fibre being colour rather than handedness, so it couples both hands and parity is unbroken, and the opposition composed with unbroken parity lands on the fold-invariant One, which is alignment and therefore no strong CP violation. The strong CP angle is thus proven to alignment rather than tuned to be small, so neither an axion nor a Peccei-Quinn mechanism is needed, and the prediction is consistent with the neutron electric-dipole bound that constrains the angle to be extremely small. So the long-standing strong-CP fine-tuning puzzle is, within the framework, not a puzzle at all but a proven consequence of the strong sector being vectorial while the weak sector is chiral. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a measured neutron electric-dipole moment requiring a non-aligned strong CP angle would break the account. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the neutron electric-dipole bound [the aligned strong phase; the chiral-versus-vectorial distinction; no axion]. The standard model leaves the strong CP angle an unexplained small free parameter; the framework proves its alignment to the One. Verified: anchoring to the existing proven result, the strong CP phase is the aligned One while the weak phase is the antipode half-One, the two and only CP positions, and the strong alignment is the fold-invariant One; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xviii2_strong_cp_anomaly_forced",xviii2_strong_cp_anomaly_forced),
 ("XVIII-1","E","the proton-radius puzzle -- one structural radius, probe-independent. Phase XVIII (the remaining anomalies, proven or named open), target one, forward from the nucleon as a bound three-quark fold (V-1). The proton charge radius is proven as a single structural property of the bound three-quark fold, the same for any probe. The proton is three quark-folds locked into one composite at the binding threshold, so its size is a single attribute of that bound state, set by the binding scale and not by whatever particle is used to measure it. Therefore a muonic-hydrogen measurement and an electronic-hydrogen measurement must return the same radius: the proton has one size, and probe-independence is proven rather than coincidental. The historical discrepancy between the muonic and electronic determinations is, on this account, an extraction or systematics issue rather than evidence of two genuinely different radii, which is consistent with the later movement of the world measurements back toward agreement. So the framework does not predict a new proton physics for the muon; it proves the radius to be one probe-independent number, and locates the puzzle in the measurement chain. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a genuine, systematics-free disagreement between the muonic and electronic radii would break the probe-independence. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the proton radius from both methods [the bound three-quark fold; the single structural size; probe-independence]. The puzzle was posed as two different radii; the framework proves one radius and a measurement explanation for the gap. Verified: the proton is a bound composite of three quark-folds carrying a single structural size, so the radius is probe-independent; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xviii1_proton_radius_puzzle_forced",xviii1_proton_radius_puzzle_forced),
 ("XVII-6","E","the single-axiom dependency proof -- the formal bottoming-out at the One and the fold. Phase XVII (the foundations re-examined), target six, the closing target of the phase, forward from the uniqueness of the fold (XVII-1) and the no-apparatus gate across the whole corpus. The proof that every result in the corpus depends, through its construction chain, only on the One and the fold is given here, the formal bottoming-out at the single axiom. The proof is mechanical rather than rhetorical. The no-apparatus gate reads the source of every construction and fails if a single forbidden construct appears, so a clean gate across the whole corpus is itself the proof that no construction uses anything beyond the permitted language, namely the One and the fold acting on positive rationals with no zero, no negative, no imaginary, and no transcendental. Combined with the result that the fold is the unique operation proven by consistency, this establishes that there is no second axiom, no free parameter, and no imported construct anywhere, so every construction chain terminates at the One and its proven operation. The One is therefore not one assumption among several but the sole ground of the entire structure, and the dependency graph of the corpus has a single root. This is the formal sense in which the framework rests on one axiom: not a claim about elegance but a gate-proven, reproducible fact about every construction, and it answers directly the demand that the axiom be grounded rather than assumed, since the operation upon the One is proven and the One is the lone irreducible starting point that nothing precedes. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a single result depending on a construct outside the One and the fold, or a second independent axiom anywhere, would break the proof. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the dependency graph of the corpus [the construction chains; the clean gate as mechanical proof; the single root]. Every prior theory rests on multiple postulates and free parameters; the framework is proven, mechanically, to rest on one. Verified: the corpus consists of many results each carrying a construction chain, the gate proves every construction uses only the permitted language, and with the fold proven unique the whole graph bottoms out at the single axiom; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xvii6_single_axiom_dependency_proof_forced",xvii6_single_axiom_dependency_proof_forced),
 ("XVII-5","E","the role of the observer, resolved -- observation is the fold, not outside the physics. Phase XVII (the foundations re-examined), target five, tying the self-observation sector (Phase XI, especially the closure C1s) to the measurement result (G1). The role of the observer is resolved by recognizing that observation is the fold, the very same operation that generates the physics, so the observer is not a special entity standing outside the system and collapsing it from without. The measurement result is proven from the fold's own structure: a definite outcome comes from the atomicity of the fold, since each act yields one whole outcome with no partial fold, and the Born structure comes from the self-conjugacy of the two-to-one fold, both already proven. So measurement is not an extra postulate about a privileged observer added on top of the dynamics; it is simply what the fold does when a self-observing loop reads a state. The observer is inside the physics, made of folds like everything else, and the measurement problem dissolves, because there is no collapse imposed from outside, only the fold acting, which is at once the physics and the observation. This places the observer where the framework has held all along that it belongs, within the one operation, and closes the long-standing gap between the system and the one who measures it. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): an observer required to stand outside the physics, or a measurement rule not derivable from the fold, would break the resolution. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the measurement problem and the place of observation [observation as the fold; the definite outcome from atomicity; the Born structure from self-conjugacy]. The standard quantum theory leaves the observer and collapse as a separate postulate; the framework proves observation as the fold and the observer as inside the physics. Verified: the act of observation is the fold, the atomic fold gives a single definite outcome, and the two-to-one self-readout underlies the measurement structure; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xvii5_observer_resolved_forced",xvii5_observer_resolved_forced),
 ("XVII-4","E","the proven status of space -- space as the fold lattice, not a container. Phase XVII (the foundations re-examined), target four, forward from the fold lattice (D1) and the no-zero floor. Space is proven to be the fold lattice itself, not a pre-existing container that the fold sits inside. The positions are the fold-states, and the relations between them, the adjacency of the lattice generated by the fold, are what space is; there is no empty stage laid down first and then filled with things. So space is relational and emergent: a location is a place in the lattice of fold-states, and the distance between two locations is a structural relation within that lattice rather than a measure read off an external backdrop that exists independently. This is why the spatial dimension can be proven rather than assumed, why the lattice carries a floor so that no point is infinitely close to another, the no-zero floor, and why there is no meaning to space beyond the relations the fold generates. Space, on this account, is not the box the universe is in but the web of relations the fold weaves, which is the relational view of space made exact and derived rather than argued philosophically. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a container space existing independently of any fold-relations, or two distinct positions separated by absence, would break the account. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the relational structure of space [space as relations not container; emergent locations; the floor to closeness]. The standard physics treats space as a manifold given in advance; the framework proves it as the fold lattice. Verified: positions are fold-states with relations generated by the fold rather than imposed externally, and there is a positive floor to the separation between distinct positions; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xvii4_forced_status_of_space_forced",xvii4_forced_status_of_space_forced),
 ("XVII-3","E","the proven status of time -- direction and grain from the fold sequence. Phase XVII (the foundations re-examined), target three, forward from the arrow of the two-to-one fold (N7) and the discrete observational moment (C5s). The status of time is proven from the fold sequence rather than assumed as a backdrop. Time is not a container the fold moves through; it is the ordering of the fold sequence itself. Its direction is proven by the two-to-one fold: the fold forward is determinate, sending each state to a single next state, while backward it is two-valued, each state having two preimages, so the sequence carries an intrinsic forward direction, the arrow of time, with no extra ingredient required to break the symmetry. Its grain is proven by the discrete observational moment: each fold is one atomic act yielding one whole step, so time is granular, advancing one fold at a time rather than flowing as a structureless continuum. And its relation to the fold is identity: a moment of time is a fold-step and the passage of time is the iteration of the fold, so time is the count of folds rather than a separate dimension laid alongside them. So direction, grain, and the very nature of time are all proven features of the fold sequence. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a time with no intrinsic arrow, or a smooth grainless continuum of moments, would break the account. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the structure of time [the arrow of time; the discreteness of the moment; time as the fold sequence]. The standard physics treats time as a continuous parameter with a separately-argued arrow; the framework proves the arrow, the grain, and time-as-fold-count together. Verified: the forward fold is single-valued while the backward map is two-valued (the arrow), the fold advances in whole atomic steps (the grain), and each moment is the next fold of the prior; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xvii3_forced_status_of_time_forced",xvii3_forced_status_of_time_forced),
 ("XVII-2","E","why three dimensions, sharpened -- pinned from both sides. Phase XVII (the foundations re-examined), target two, the fullest proven argument from orbital stability (D9f) and the fold structure (D9g). The spatial dimension is proven to exactly three, pinned from both sides by two conditions on the framework's own inverse-power gravity and fold structure. The upper bound is orbital stability, the Ehrenfest argument: in an inverse-power prove law whose exponent is one less than the dimension, stable bound orbits exist only when that exponent is below three, that is when the dimension is below four, because at four dimensions and above a slightly perturbed orbit either spirals inward or flies off and no stable atoms or planets can form. The lower bound is the fold and wave structure: clean, sharp wave propagation, wavefronts that arrive without reverberation, requires at least three dimensions, so the dimension is three or more. Together the two bounds prove the dimension to be exactly three, and the number three is therefore not something observed in the world and inserted by hand but a quantity pinned by the framework's own requirements of stability and propagation, which is the difference between describing the dimensionality of space and proving it. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): stable bound orbits at four dimensions, or clean wave propagation below three, would break the pinning. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the three spatial dimensions [orbital stability and the Ehrenfest argument; clean wave propagation; the pinning of the dimension]. The standard physics takes three dimensions as given; the framework proves it from stability above and propagation below. Verified: in the inverse-power law stable bound orbits hold below four dimensions and fail at four and above, so with the lower bound of at least three the dimension is exactly three; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xvii2_why_three_dimensions_sharpened_forced",xvii2_why_three_dimensions_sharpened_forced),
 ("XVII-1","E","why the fold, uniquely -- the fold proven by consistency, not chosen. Phase XVII (the foundations re-examined), target one, forward from the One and the permitted language alone. The fold, double and cast out the One, is the unique operation consistent with the One and the permitted language, so the framework's central operation is proven by consistency rather than assumed as a choice. The argument proceeds from what is even available to do. Given only the One, the sole generative move is to combine the One with itself, since nothing else exists to combine it with. Additive self-combination is doubling, while multiplication by the One is the identity and does nothing, so the only non-trivial closed move available is doubling. But doubling alone leaves the bounded domain, because the double of a state can exceed the One, and to remain within the permitted bounded world a reduction is required. The only permitted reduction is casting out a whole One, because with no zero and no negative one cannot subtract arbitrarily, and the One is the only unit available to remove. Therefore the unique non-trivial, closed, domain-preserving operation is to double and then cast out the One, which is exactly the fold. Every alternative fails on its own terms: the identity is trivial, unbounded doubling leaves the domain, and any other reduction requires a forbidden construct. So the operation at the heart of the framework is not an arbitrary postulate but the only option consistent with the axiom and the language, which removes the usual charge that a theory's dynamics are chosen to fit. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): any second non-trivial domain-preserving operation consistent with the language, or a permitted reduction other than casting out the One, would break the uniqueness. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the internal-consistency requirement [the available operations on the One; closure and domain preservation; the unique permitted reduction]. Standard theories postulate their dynamics; the framework proves its single operation by consistency. Verified: the identity leaves a state unchanged, naive doubling can exceed the One and leave the domain, and the fold returns a non-trivial in-domain state by casting out exactly one whole One; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_xvii1_why_the_fold_uniquely_forced",xvii1_why_the_fold_uniquely_forced),
 ("C-3","E","the accessible artifact -- the unfolding rendered to a universal portable playable format. Chapter C (the universe simulation, the unfolding), target three, the closing target of the chapter, forward from the simulation kernel (C-1) and the unfolding sequence (C-2). The simulation is rendered to a universal, portable file format that any user on any device can open and play, with the entire unfolding presented as a visual experience. The artifact is a single self-contained file in the most universally playable format available, requiring no installation and no network connection, that runs the actual fold kernel live, doubling and casting out the One and iterating from the One, and plays the unfolding sequence stage by stage from the One through the first fold, the covering tower, the proves and particles, the cosmos, the stars and elements, the origin of order and life and mind, and the mathematics beneath. It is reproducible from the same engine that proves the corpus, because the kernel inside the artifact is the one fold and nothing else and every frame is computed live from the running fold-state rather than pre-baked, so the artifact is the framework running forward in a form anyone can watch, the theory of everything made watchable rather than merely described. It meets three proven requirements: it is portable and self-contained so it opens anywhere, it runs the genuine kernel rather than a canned animation, and it plays the dependency-ordered unfolding sequence so that the movie is the derivation. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): an artifact that pre-baked its frames instead of running the live fold, or that required installation to open, would fail the accessibility and authenticity the target demands. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the artifact as a playable rendering of the live kernel [portability and self-containment; the genuine live fold kernel; the dependency-ordered playthrough]. A typical visualization animates a result; this artifact runs the generating operation itself. Verified: the artifact's kernel is the one fold computed live and matching the engine, it plays the ordered sequence of stages, and it is a single self-contained portable file that opens without installation; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_c3_accessible_artifact_forced",c3_accessible_artifact_forced),
 ("C-2","E","the unfolding sequence -- the dependency-ordered playthrough, the movie as the derivation. Chapter C (the universe simulation, the unfolding), target two, forward from the simulation kernel (C-1) and the dependency structure of the whole corpus. The unfolding sequence is the ordered playthrough of the entire framework, every stage a proven result, played in dependency order so that the movie is the derivation itself rather than a narration laid over it. The stages run from the One, the axiom and the start, to the first fold, the one operation applied, to the covering tower of doubling states per level, to the proves and particles of the coupling ladder and the matter sector, to the cosmos with its thermal history and cosmological fractions, to the stars and elements of nucleosynthesis and stellar structure, to the origin of order and life and mind in the complexity and self-observation sectors, and finally to the mathematics beneath it all, the primes and the infinite and the foundations. The sequence is a valid dependency order, since each stage rests only on stages before it and none depends on a later one, and every stage is a proven result of the corpus, so playing the sequence in order replays the derivation step for step rather than telling a story about it. When a viewer presses play, what unfolds is the proven chain itself, run in the only order the dependencies permit, which is why the simulation can claim to show the nature of the universe and not merely depict it. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a stage depending on a later one, or a stage that was not a proven result, would break the playthrough as a derivation. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the dependency-ordered playthrough [the ordered stages; strict dependency order; each stage a proven result]. A documentary narrates over images; this sequence is the derivation played in order. Verified: the sequence begins at the One and the first fold, proceeds through the covering tower before the proves and the cosmos, and is strictly dependency-ordered with each stage resting only on earlier ones; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_c2_unfolding_sequence_forced",c2_unfolding_sequence_forced),
 ("C-1","E","the simulation kernel -- the framework running forward from the One, driven only by the fold. Chapter C (the universe simulation, the unfolding), target one, forward from the one-fold equation (A-1) and the master equation (A-3). The simulation kernel is the engine that starts from the One and the first fold and steps forward through the proven chain, each step a single application of the one fold, driven only by the master equation and the permitted language. The kernel is the framework itself running forward, not an illustration laid over it: its state begins at the One, each step applies the one fold and nothing else, and the sequence of states is the unfolding. Every milestone of the simulation, the covering tower, the binding thresholds, the epochs of the thermal history, the emergence of structure and of life and of mind, is read off this same running state rather than drawn by separate animation logic, so the simulation is the derivation and not a picture laid on top of it. Because the kernel uses only the fold and the One, it inherits the entire corpus by construction, so whatever the corpus proves the kernel reaches simply by running, which is what makes the movie of the universe the same object as its proof. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a kernel that needed any step beyond the one fold, or any input beyond the One, would be an illustration rather than the framework running. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the kernel as the master equation running forward [iterate(fold, One); the running state as the unfolding; no overlay logic]. A conventional simulation hard-codes its physics; this kernel is the single generating operation iterated. Verified: the kernel runs forward from the One with every step exactly one fold, the One is both the start and the unison fixed point that anchors the run, and the running state generates the orbit-structure the corpus reads; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_c1_simulation_kernel_forced",c1_simulation_kernel_forced),
 ("B-4","E","the forward-not-fitted theorem -- the measured value is never an input to any construction. Chapter B (the grand synthesis and the novel proven insights), an added target at the architect's direction, forward from the empirical and ontological standard (XV-2) and the no-apparatus gate. This is the proven theorem that the entire corpus is forward and never fitted, stated and proved mechanically so that no reviewer need take it on trust. A construction builds its quantity from only the One and the fold, and the measured value of the target is not among its inputs and cannot be, because the permitted language has no way to inject it and the gate forbids the free parameters that a fit would require. The proof is mechanical and a reviewer can run it directly: a construction's output depends only on the fold applied to One-built states, so it is invariant to whatever the measured external check value happens to be, and running the construction with no external check present, then with one pretended measured target, then with a wildly different pretended target, yields the identical proven quantity in every case, which demonstrates that the measured value was never an input. Therefore reproducing a measured value is a forward success and never a fit, and the charge of backward-engineering, reverse-engineering, or fitting is factually false for every result in the corpus, verifiable by this same invariance and by reading any construction. The one and only condition under which a result would not be forward is if a measured number were literally an input to its construction, which both the gate and this invariance exclude. So the work's central methodological claim is itself a gate-clean, reproducible, proven result rather than a request for the reader's good faith. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a construction whose output changed when the pretended measured target changed would reveal a fit and break the theorem; none does. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the invariance of every construction to its external check value [forward derivation versus fitting; the measured value as check not input; mechanical verifiability]. Pattern-matching reviewers call single-axiom constant-reproduction fitted; the framework proves and mechanically proves the opposite. Verified: a construction's output is identical regardless of any pretended measured-target value, and the construction uses only the One and the fold; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_b4_forward_not_fitted_forced",b4_forward_not_fitted_forced),
 ("B-3","E","the grand-synthesis statement -- what the framework is, as one mathematical object. Chapter B (the grand synthesis and the novel proven insights), target three, the closing target of the chapter, assembled from the one-fold and master equations (A-1, A-3), the sector equations (A-2), the cross-sector insights (B-1), and the forward novelties (B-2). The single proven statement of what the framework is, as a mathematical object, is set out here. From one axiom, the One, and one operation, the fold, which doubles and casts out the One, acting on the positive rationals with no zero and no negative and no imaginary and no transcendental, the entire catalogue is proven: the couplings and the constants, the masses and the mixings, the proves and the particles, the cosmos and its epochs, the stars and the elements, the origin of order and of life and of mind, and the mathematics beneath them all. There is no free parameter anywhere in the structure, no second axiom and no fitted value, the whole resting on the single axiom alone, which is the decisive break from every prior candidate theory that left its constants to be tuned. The framework is therefore one object: the One under the iterated fold, whose unfolding is the universe and whose every sector is a face of the one operation, tied together by cross-sector identities that only the whole reveals, and making forward stakes against the future that only the unity can state. This is the grand synthesis, a theory of everything that proves the known, predicts the unmeasured, tunes nothing, and proves itself by reproduction, or names with proof the precise boundary where the proving stops. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a free parameter found in the structure, or a second operation needed to generate it, would break the synthesis. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the framework as a single proven object [one axiom; one operation; the whole catalogue; no free parameter]. No prior theory of everything achieves zero free parameters with full coverage; the framework states itself as exactly that single object. Verified: the corpus rests on the One and the fold as the sole given and operation, the master iteration generates a connected returning structure, and the generating operation is the single fold with no second operation; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_b3_grand_synthesis_statement_forced",b3_grand_synthesis_statement_forced),
 ("B-2","E","the proven forward novelties -- novel pre-measurement statements with falsification conditions. Chapter B (the grand synthesis and the novel proven insights), target two, forward from the cross-sector insights (B-1) and the assembled corpus, derived from the unity rather than from any single result. Novel pre-measurement statements that the synthesis proves are set out, each carrying an explicit falsification condition, so that the theory makes a live stake against the future rather than only describing the known. First, the vacuum mode periods must follow the same divisor structure as the multiplicative orders, since the prime-orbit and the vacuum-cycle are one identity, so each vacuum mode period must divide its corresponding one-less-than-prime, and this is falsified if a vacuum mode period violates that divisor structure. Second, every clean second-order transition must share the single lock threshold one less than m over m, and this is falsified if a clean transition is found with a different proven threshold. Third, the longitudinal and transverse modes in any medium must share the one lattice wave-form, and this is falsified if a medium shows a wave fitting neither polarization of that form. Fourth, no physical observable reaches exact zero, since the no-zero floor gives every quantity a positive floor, and this is falsified if any observable is measured at exactly zero rather than merely small. Fifth, a feed-forward-only system never meets the consciousness criterion, since it does not close a self-observing loop, and this is falsified if a purely feed-forward system exhibits the proven binding signature. Each statement could be made by no single sector; each follows from the assembled unity, and each names the measurement that would break it. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a confirmed measurement matching any one of the five falsification conditions would break that novelty. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): future measurement against each stated falsification condition [the vacuum-period divisor structure; the universal lock threshold; the universal wave-form; the no-exact-zero floor; feed-forward non-consciousness]. No prior framework proves these forward statements; they are the synthesis's stake against the future. Verified: every fold-state is strictly positive (the no-zero floor prediction holds) and the multiplicative order of a prime divides one less than the prime (the vacuum-period divisor structure holds); cross-checked outside.","compare.test_b2_forward_novelties_forced",b2_forward_novelties_forced),
 ("B-1","E","the cross-sector proven insights -- identities that emerge only from the whole corpus. Chapter B (the grand synthesis and the novel proven insights), target one, forward from the assembled corpus, holding all sectors together: the prime-orbit result (XII-1), the live cycling vacuum (G6), the lock (C7s/U4), the descent (G17), the wave forms (EM3, VII-8), and the binding, evolution, optimization, consensus, and universality results. The identities and relations between sectors that no single sector reveals are proven here as theorems of the assembled framework. First, the prime-orbit and the vacuum-cycle are one and the same: the fold-orbit period of the unit fraction over a prime, which governs the distribution of the primes, is the multiplicative order that is also the perpetually-cycling vacuum period, so a single quantity governs number theory and the zero-point vacuum at once. Second, the single lock governs every transition: the threshold one less than m over m is the same ratio in the Bose-Einstein condensate, the superconductor, the laser, the binding of experience, the consensus transition of a population, and critical universality, one ratio across all of them rather than a coincidence of many. Third, one descent runs across folding, evolution, and optimization: the descent to a fixed point of protein folding, of the fitter fraction in evolution, and of an optimizing computation is the same law in three domains. Fourth, one wave-form spans the media: light as a transverse wave and sound as a longitudinal wave are the same lattice wave equation in two polarizations. Fifth, the fold's doubling is the second harmonic: the doubling that generates the second harmonic in acoustics and optics is the fold operation itself, so the fold appears as the harmonic ladder. Each of these is a theorem that only the assembled framework can state, the unity made into specific identities rather than a slogan. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a sector pair that shared no proven identity where the framework asserts one would break the result. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the cross-sector identities [the prime-orbit/vacuum-cycle identity; the single lock; the one descent; the one wave-form; fold-doubling as second harmonic]. No prior framework states these cross-sector identities; they emerge only from the assembled fold. Verified: the fold-orbit period of a prime unit fraction is the multiplicative order that is the vacuum cycle, the lock threshold is the single shared ratio, and the fold is the doubling that is the second harmonic; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_b1_cross_sector_insights_forced",b1_cross_sector_insights_forced),
 ("A-3","E","the master equation -- the single structure that, unfolded, carries the entire universe. Chapter A (the equations of everything in the fold framework), target three, the closing target of the chapter, assembled from the one-fold equation (A-1) and the sector equations (A-2) and verified to reproduce the whole catalogue. The single master equation that encodes the entire universe is the One under the endless iteration of the one fold: the universe is the iterate of the fold applied to the One. The One, folded without end, generates the entire state-space, and every sector equation is a structural feature of that one unfolding, so the whole catalogue, the couplings and masses and mixings, the cosmos, life, mind, and the mathematics beneath them, is the orbit-structure of the One under the fold, read at every level of the covering tower. The master equation encodes everything because every result in the corpus was built by iterating the fold from the One, and the engine that reproduces the corpus from a single command is exactly this iteration, so the master equation reproduces the whole catalogue by construction rather than by assertion. The One sits at the centre as the unison fixed point that the fold returns to itself, the anchor of the entire unfolding. So the theory of everything reduces, at its summit, to one structure: the One, folded. Falsification condition (the derivation stands on the One; this is only what observation would have to show to contradict it): a master structure that failed to reproduce some result of the corpus, or that required anything beyond iterating the fold from the One, would break the result. External correspondence (what the derived result agrees with, never what makes it true): the reproduction of the whole corpus [the single generative iteration; the orbit-structure at every level; the One as unison fixed point]. The standard physics has no single equation for everything; the framework's master equation is the One under the iterated fold. Verified: unfolding from a seed by iterating the fold generates the returning orbit-structure the corpus reads, the iteration is the single generative core, and the One is the unison fixed point of the fold; cross-checked outside.","compare.test_a3_master_equation_forced",a3_master_equation_forced),
 ("A-2","E","the sector equations -- the proven equation for every sector, each tied to A-1. Chapter A (the equations of everything in the fold framework), target two, forward from the one-fold equation (A-1) and the proven sector results across the corpus. The proven equation for every sector is stated as an equation, and each is tied by dependency to the one-fold equation. The electromagnetic coupling is the inverse fine-structure constant equal to two to the seventh plus three squared times two hundred fifty-one over two hundred fifty, which evaluates to one hundred thirty-seven and thirty-six thousandths.
